entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `contactId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `remoteHref` TEXT NOT NULL, `etag` TEXT NOT NULL, `uid` TEXT NOT NULL, `isDirty` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isDeletedLocally` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastSynced` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_sync_state_contactId
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_state_contactId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`contactId`)

indices.name: index_sync_state_uid
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_state_uid` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uid`)

indices.name: index_sync_state_remoteHref
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_state_remoteHref` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`remoteHref`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
